PRISM_MOD_RELIC_PRISMATIC_SHARD.title: Prismatic Shard
PRISM_MOD_RELIC_PRISMATIC_SHARD.descript: Start with two [color=#ff4d4d]s[/color][color=#ff9f1c]p[/color][color=#ffd60a]e[/color][color=#43d17a]c[/color][color=#31c6f7]i[/color][color=#8b5cf6]a[/color][color=#ff4db8]l[/color] relics. Card rewards receive a random Enchantment with 1-3 stacks.
PRISM_MOD_RELIC_PRISMATIC_SHARD.flavor: A fragment that reflects too many possibilities.
